summary: Game Tile Pregame MVPD Required Hide Spoilers ON
description:
GIVEN TTS is turned ON
AND the user is logged in
AND Hide Spoilers is turned ON
AND an MVPD Required game is on the schedule
AND the user is on the Home page

steps.action: WHEN focus is assigned to an MVPD Required game tile that has not yet gone to Live in the Games Carousel
steps.result: THEN the following statement is spoken, "Game <x> of <y>, <away_team> at <home_team>, <game_start_time> Game Start Time, Not Entitled, MVPD Required, Press select to play game. Move <appropriate_directions> to navigate to a new item. Move up or down to browse new content."
